description_long: This is a robust, box-shaped oven with a matte black front and metallic gray sides and back, designed for heavy-duty or industrial use. The front features a prominent rectangular door with a large, slightly arched window, through which a vivid depiction of burning logs is visible, suggesting it is a wood-fired oven. A sturdy, protruding handle is mounted on the right side of the door, and a small metallic drawer is located beneath the main chamber, likely for ash collection. The top of the oven is fitted with a wide, cylindrical metallic flue or chimney for smoke exhaust. The overall construction appears solid and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on utility.
description: A heavy-duty, boxy oven with a large front window, metallic chimney, and sturdy handle, designed for wood-fired operation. Its exterior is mostly matte black with metallic gray sides and a functional, industrial look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main oven door with a large window displaying burning logs, a prominent handle on the right, and a metallic drawer below.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals a plain, flat metallic gray panel with the handle and door edge slightly visible at the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a featureless metallic gray back and the cylindrical chimney on top.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with a plain metallic gray panel and a glimpse of the door and handle at the front.
attribute_control_panel_design: No visible control panel; the front features only a door with a window, a handle, and a drawer, with no knobs, buttons, or digital displays apparent.
attribute_door_handle_type: Protruding, horizontally mounted handle on the right side of the door, metallic in appearance, with a simple, utilitarian design and a rounded grip for ergonomic use.
attribute_window_presence: present; large rectangular window with a slightly arched top, centrally placed in the oven door.
attribute_ventilation_features: A large cylindrical metallic chimney is mounted on the top center, serving as the primary exhaust for smoke and heat.
